releaseNotes: Show Mode toggle declutters the controller for live operation. Live OBS overlay preview strip mirrors what's on stream. Undo toast for routine deletes and Clear All. Connection-status pill (server / local / unreachable). Independent font selectors for routine vs message overlays. Outline / shadow / plain text-style toggle. Sticky Now Showing + Nav header. Collapsible OBS Setup banners. Next Up wraps on narrow widths instead of disappearing.
